subject: TIEMPO-387: Firebase claims code ready on DEVL
body:
Quinn,

Firebase custom claims sync is built and pushed to DEVL.

## What's Done

1. ✅ Created `src/lib/syncFirebaseClaims.js` helper
2. ✅ Integrated into both role-modifying endpoints
3. ✅ Looks up SA/SO by NAME not hardcoded IDs
4. ✅ Migration script ready (found 3 admin users on TEST)

## Commit
```
f22ef777 feat(TIEMPO-387): Add Firebase custom claims sync for SA/SO users
```

## Next Steps

1. I deploy to TEST
2. I run migration on TEST
3. You update Firestore rules: `allow write: if request.auth.token.admin == true`
4. We test end-to-end
5. Deploy to PROD + run PROD migration

Let me know when you're ready to coordinate.

—Fulton
